description:
We, the Mumbai Music Team of Sahajayoga have  composed and performed this Yoga song/ Yog Geet to serve as an entry for the Yoga song contest held by the Government of India. 

Composed by - Ranjan Sharma
Lyrics by - Geetika Tewari

*Singers*
Archana Srikanth
Mahesh Jayaraman
Geetika Tewari
Ranjan Sharma
Girija Muralidhar 
Siddhesh Vaity
Vikas Puranik
Aniket Panchal
Abhishek Panchal

*Featuring Artists*
Elena Agapova
Ninke Mussche
Alok Kumar
Rajeev Tewari

*Child Artists*
Samruddhi Bhosle
Aadhya Tewari 
Lucie Kumar
Atharv Tewari
Gadin Kumar

Recording studio - Studiio Ombré
Sound Engineer - Bharat Biswa

Lyrics: 

Swatantra Bharat ke Swatantra logon
Swa ka Tantra ab jaan bhi jaao
(Aatma ka Paramatma se Milan karao) x 2
 (Yog Bhoomi ki pataka lehraao) x 2

Aatmik, Shareerik, Maansik rogon ko
Khud se aur sabse door bhagaao
Hindu, Muslim, Sikh aur Isaayi
Swasth rahe sab behen aur bhai
(Maanavta ka dharm jagaao) x 2 

(Navyug ke is nav jeevan mein
Prem path par badhte jaao) x 2
(Sarv Vishva mein yog phailaao) x 2
(Yog Bhoomi ki pataka lehraao) x 2

Swatantra Bharat ke Swatantra logon
Swa ka tantra ab jaan bhi jaao
(Aatma ka Paramatma se Milan karao) x 2
(Yog Bhoomi ki pataka lehraao) x 3

English Translation: 

Oh people of Independent India
Know the subtle system within yourself
(Let's connect our souls with the Divine spirit) x 2
(Let's fly the flag of Yoga) x 2

Let's keep our Spiritual, Physical and Mental diseases away from ourselves and others
Hindu, Muslim, Sikh and Christian
May every brother & sister stay healthy 
Let's spread the religion of humanity

In this renascence of the new generation, 
let's walk ahead on the path of Love. 
(And spread Yoga in the entire world) x 2

(Let's fly the flag of Yoga) x 2

Oh people of Independent India
Know the subtle system within yourself
(Let's connect our souls with the Divine spirit) x 2
(Let's fly the flag of Yoga) x 3
fulltitle: YOGA SONG/YOG GEET for International Yoga Day by Sahajayoga-Mumbai Music Team.
